title: About MeriPehchaan
heading_chain: Single Citizen Login across the system
heading: Single Citizen Login across the system
section: Single Citizen Login across the system
text:
# Single Citizen Login across the system

Provide secure and simple access to various public services
— Anytime, Anywhere.

##### Seamless User Onboarding

Users can seamlessly access various services

##### Standardized Registration

Users need not submit different credentials for different services

##### Multifactor Authentication

To provide greater level of Security and
Privacy
